Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants 20 open ended thought provoking questions based on the provided pseudo BPMN representation of a multinational smartphone supply chain process

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Key aspects of the process to analyze 1 Sequential start Market Research RD Design 2 Parallel sourcing 4 different component streams from different countries Taiwan Japan South Korea Germany USA 3 Convergence Shipping to Malaysia for assembly 4 Manufacturing 24 7 assembly with quality control loop rework scrap if fail 5 Distribution split Air vs Sea freight based on market demand 6 Customs Compliance 7 Regional distribution 4 regions 8 Final distribution parallel tasks Warehousing Retail E commerce VIP Direct 9 Inventory monitoring with feedback loop to suppliers

Text: Categories to cover Rationale behind process flows why these specific countries why parallel vs sequential Potential improvements bottlenecks efficiency technology Risk management geopolitical supply disruption quality failures Decision making criteria for air vs sea rework vs scrap demand forecasting Stakeholder communication coordination across 10 countries cultural language barriers Performance measurement KPIs SLA management end to end visibility

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I need 20 questions that are Open ended not yes no Thought provoking require analysis strategy critical thinking Specific to this process not generic supply chain questions Covering the requested categories

Name: Validation - PE
